name: hb_1_29
requirements: As part of your analysis, define steel emission as total exhaust_gas over all STEEL-industry companies in Wu'an City. Compute and store: total_steel_apr (April 2025), total_steel_may (May 2025) (float), higher_emission_month ('April' or 'May', str), emission_change_pct ((May-April)/April*100, float), and the air-quality side: mean_aqi_apr, mean_aqi_may (Wu'an district mean AQI per month, float).

turns.query: Compare steel industry emissions and air quality between April and May 2025 in Wu'an City.
